💌 Dil Ki Baatein 💌
👑
Aap mera sabse bada hero hai Raamji Bhaiya! Aapki hansi se ghar roshan hota hai. Aaj aapka din hai — king ki tarah enjoy kariye! 🎊
🌟
Har sapna poora ho tera, har dua qubool ho. Zindagi mein utni khushiyan aayein jitne is asman mein tare hain! ✨
🎂
Bhaiya, umar bhar muskurate raho. Sehat, daulat aur pyaar — teeno milte rahein. Happy Birthday once again! 🥳❤️

🎂 HAPPY BIRTHDAY
